team.date_founded: Founded at the great transit hub of the Asteroid Belt, where every shipping lane crosses and every kind of person passes through.
team.number_of_fans: Around 15 million transient, fiercely loyal belt-dwellers.
team.badge: Three shipping lanes crossing at a single bright node, ringed by asteroids.
team.home_kit: Industrial blue and steel-grey with a crossroads motif on the chest.
team.away_kit: Hazard-yellow with black trim, like a docking beacon.
team.history: Beltway are forged in the lawless transit colonies — tactical, gritty, and impossible to intimidate. They sit deep, soak up everything, and counter with cold precision, the football equivalent of a hard bargain struck at a busy port.
team.club_culture: Streetwise, pragmatic, and unsentimental. The Junkers respect graft and trust no one who hasn't earned it.
team.political_leaning: Belt-syndicalist — a haulers' and dockers' club through and through.
trophy_cabinet: A reputation as the belt's craftiest cup fighters
legends: Cargo Vels — the counterattacking captain who never gave the ball away cheaply
achievements: Most efficient counterattacking record in the belt

stadium.date_built: Built into the transit hub's old docking ring.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the belt's shipping and haulage guilds.
stadium.pitch_size: Compact and functional, suited to the deep, narrow block.
stadium.pitch_type: Hardy synthetic turf rated for the colony's variable gravity.
stadium.bio: The Junction is a noisy, no-frills bowl where the crowd packs in tight between shipping gantries. Away teams find it cramped, hostile, and very hard to break down.

training_facility.date_built: A standard-grade facility wedged into the transit colony.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded co-operatively by the haulage guilds.
training_facility.bio: The Junction Academy drills organisation and transition above all — winning the ball, keeping the shape, and breaking fast. It is practical schooling for a practical club.

manager.appearance: Wiry and watchful, with the unhurried calm of a man who has negotiated his whole life.
manager.bio: Transit Obi is a streetwise tactician who built Beltway into the belt's hardest team to beat. His counterattacking sides give nothing away and punish every loose moment.
manager.playing_history: A defensive midfielder who spent his career at unfashionable belt clubs.
manager.playing_philosophy: Hold your shape, win the duel, and counter when they overcommit. Nothing for free.
manager.culture: A son of the transit colonies who trusts only effort.
achievements: Built the belt's meanest counterattacking side

managing_staff.appearance: Compact and intense, lives for the moment the ball turns over.
managing_staff.bio: Junction Moretti drills the transition that turns Beltway's defending into instant attack, the specialist who makes the counter lethal.
managing_staff.playing_history: A journeyman midfielder turned transition coach.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: The counter is won in the first three seconds. Drill them until it is instinct.

players.appearance: Calm and solid, the steady start of the counter.
players.bio: Corridor Vasquez is the balanced keeper who launches Beltway's breaks with fast, accurate distribution.

players.appearance: Tireless and rugged, grafts the flank.
players.bio: Bypass Torres is the workhorse full-back who covers every metre of the right channel for ninety minutes.
achievements: Most distance covered by a defender

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the deep defender.
players.bio: Highway Kane is the team-first defender who holds the block disciplined and patient.

players.appearance: Combative and firm, the bite in the block.
players.bio: Transit Walker is the aggressive defender who breaks up attacks to feed the counter.

players.appearance: Balanced and watchful, times the spring.
players.bio: Toll Rivera is the composed defender who reads the moment to counter, the patient timer of the break.

players.appearance: Inventive and quick, the brain of the break.
players.bio: Freeway Chen is the creative spark who threads the killing pass the instant Beltway win the ball.

players.appearance: Willing and selfless, the engine of transition.
players.bio: Ramp Petrov is the team-first runner who powers Beltway from deep block to fast break.

players.appearance: Balanced and tidy, the controlled link.
players.bio: Junction Morales is the composed midfielder who keeps the counter purposeful rather than frantic.
achievements: Highest pass completion on the break

players.appearance: Lean and predatory, the point of the break.
players.bio: Exit Park is the selfish finisher who feeds on the space the counter creates, cold in front of goal.

players.appearance: Direct and combative, sparks the break.
players.bio: Merge Kim is the aggressive forward who triggers the counter by hounding defenders into mistakes.
achievements: Most high turnovers won by a forward

players.appearance: Self-assured and sharp, a second finisher.
players.bio: Overpass Okafor is the selfish forward who doubles the threat on the break, hungry to outscore his partner.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Underpass Tanaka is the cautious veteran second keeper, dependable when called upon.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Offramp Nakamura is the team-first deputy who slots into the block without weakening it.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Onramp Fischer is the promising young defender learning the belt's hard, patient ways.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Interchange Hayashi is the creative deputy who can unlock a stubborn block from the bench.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Detour Sato is the eager young finisher pushing for a place, learning the art of the belt counter.
